sentences.translation: Majka je kupila hljeb, sir i med.
sentences.translationEn: The mother bought bread, cheese, and honey.

sentences.translation: Pripremila je doručak za pet minuta.
sentences.translationEn: She prepared breakfast in five minutes.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الْجَمِيعُ وَأَكَلُوا قَبْلَ الذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su sjeli i jeli prije odlaska na posao.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone sat and ate before going to work.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْفُطُورُ خَفِيفًا لَكِنَّهُ أَعْطَاهُمُ الطَّاقَةَ.
sentences.translation: Doručak je bio lagan ali im je dao energiju.
sentences.translationEn: The breakfast was light but gave them energy.
